children.heading: Sole consignee and importer
children.label: a Sole consignee and importer
children.text: Each fair operator designated by the Secretary of Commerce pursuant to shall be deemed the sole consignee and importer of all articles entered under for the fair for which such operator has been designated.section 1751 of this titlesection 1752 of this title

children.heading: Reimbursement of customs charges and expenses
children.label: b Reimbursement of customs charges and expenses
children.text: The actual and necessary customs charges for labor, services, and other expenses in connection with the entry, examination, appraisement, custody, abandonment, destruction, or release of articles entered under , together with the necessary charges for salaries of customs officers and employees in connection with the accounting for, custody of, and supervision over, such articles, shall be reimbursed to the United States by the operator of the fair for which they are entered. Receipts from such reimbursements shall be deposited as refunds to the appropriation from which paid, in the manner provided for in .section 1752 of this titlesection 1524 of this title
